steps: Go to https://www.datocms.com/dashboard and log in or create an account
Select your project from the dashboard
In the left sidebar, go to Settings > API Tokens
Give it a name and choose the role (Read-only or Full-access)
Click 'Save' and copy the token — it is shown in full only here

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: DatoCMS API token sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with limited content records and API calls
API tokens are project-scoped — each project has its own tokens
The token is displayed in full only at creation time; save it securely
Read-only tokens can only perform GET operations; full-access tokens can create, update, and delete

test_endpoint.description: List all content models in the project to verify the API token is valid
